description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 21st, a test vehicle operating in manual driving mode was making a u-turn from Westbound to Eastbound Homestead Road at 
the intersection with Kennewick Drive in Sunnyvale when the right front tire and rim made contact with the curb.  No injuries were reported 
and law enforcement was not called to the scene.  The test vehicle sustained damage to the right front rim.
Print
Clear Form
